_meta.description: LLM-assisted GICS gap-fill (classification-multisource AC #4). Last-resort, low-trust, REVIEWABLE source: operating companies the deterministic sources (financedatabase/b3/sec_sic/yahoo_profile) left unclassified - almost all recent renames/spinoffs. Written source='llm'. Funds/ETFs are DELIBERATELY ABSENT - a fund has no GICS sector, so none is invented. Edit this file + re-run `sym classify --llm` to revise. Each sector MUST be one of the 11 GICS sectors.
